prompt: Use case: illustration-story. Asset type: website process icon. Primary request: flat vector illustration in premium template style showing a customer placing an amigurumi order via smartphone call and WhatsApp. Scene/background: soft abstract shapes, pastel blue and pastel pink only. Subject: hand holding phone with clean UI card, tiny amigurumi bear preview, call and message symbols. Style/medium: modern SVG-style vector, minimal, geometric, no outlines heavier than medium. Composition/framing: centered icon composition with clear whitespace and balanced blocks. Lighting/mood: bright, friendly, polished. Color palette: dominant #DFF4FF and #FFD8E8 with deep navy accents. Constraints: no text, no watermark, no brand logos, no photo texture.

Use case: illustration-story. Asset type: website process icon. Lighting/mood: warm and handcrafted but crisp. Color palette: only pastel blue #DFF4FF and pastel pink #FFD8E8 plus dark accent. Constraints: no text, no watermark, no logos, avoid clutter.
